events.description: The first fixture-only Git commit normalized authored CRLF bytes to LF. Before any CHILI benchmark or local-model call, the commit was amended with a fixture-local .gitattributes rule and all 27 authored Git blobs were verified byte-for-byte against the external originals.
events.impact: No semantic fixture change. The final fixture commit is 59709db31acd220d676c0cbd7eb7cb94ba0c3403 and has zero authored-blob mismatches.

events.description: A staged diff whitespace check treated preserved CRLF endings as trailing whitespace and printed portions of repair-oracle files in the parent controller's tool output before the untouched run.
events.impact: The evaluation is model-blind but not fully controller-blind. Benchmark settings and implementation were frozen beforehand; no CHILI source, test, fixture, model, timeout, or repair-round setting changed afterward. The local Qwen contestant receives oracle feedback only through the benchmark's bounded repair path and receives no final-oracle content. No manual intervention is permitted during the run.

claim_constraint: Report this slice as independently authored and CHILI-model-blind, with partial controller exposure disclosed. Do not describe it as fully controller-blind.
